comments.overrides: Pin patched versions of build-time-only transitive deps pulled by the @netlify/* adapter tooling (path-traversal / stack-overflow / bounds-check advisories). All stay within their current major so the adapter's APIs are unaffected. esbuild is deliberately NOT overridden — its remaining advisory is dev-server-on-Windows only (irrelevant to Linux CI builds) and forcing its version risks breaking Netlify's function bundler. Revisit when @astrojs/netlify's next major (which targets Astro 7) lands.
